nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Kikau
nodes.summary: Kikau（Foulehaio procerior）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Kikau。

nodes.name: Foulehaio
nodes.summary: Foulehaio（Foulehaio）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Kikau、Polynesian wattled honeyeater、Fiji wattled honeyeater。

nodes.name: Kikau
nodes.summary: The kikau or western wattled honeyeater (Foulehaio procerior) is a species of bird in the honeyeater family Meliphagidae. It was considered conspecific with the Fiji wattled honeyeater and the Polynesian wattled honeyeater. The species is endemic to Viti Levu, Ovalau and the islands of the Yasawa Archipelago in Fiji. Its natural habitats are tropical moist lowland forests, tropical mangrove forests, and tropical moist montane forest. References
